_note: Full-body character art: centered hero pose, head-to-toe visible, signature outfit and gear, game-faithful environment behind. Perfect for 'NEW CHARACTER REVEALED' or build showcase thumbnails. Uses 2:3 portrait aspect internally for character detail, composited onto 16:9 later if needed.
template: full-body character art of {subject} from {game}, standing in a heroic pose visible head to toe, wearing their signature outfit and gear, {emotion} expression, recognizable {game} environment and creatures in the background, faithful {game} art style, {palette} palette, {lighting}, ultra-detailed game render, sharp focus, professional character splash art
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low contrast, extra limbs, deformed, close-up, cropped body, feet only, legs only, headless, generic, unrelated game

rubric.full_body: 1-5 — head to toe visible, not cropped?
